posts.title: Midnight Foundation engages proactively with regulators on stablecoin policy
posts.excerpt: To support its mission of advancing privacy-enhancing financial technology, the Midnight Foundation submitted a public consultation response to inform future policy on stablecoins and privacy in financial transactions.
